title: What Explains the Growing Divide Between Oil and Gas (Podcast)
title_cn: 什么解释了石油和天然气之间日益扩大的鸿沟（播客）
summary: Gas and oil are on a sharply divergent path. In BloombergNEF’s Economic Transition Scenario, oil demand peaks before the end of the decade, while gas demand continues to grow as expanding power systems seek reliable sources of generation. At the same time, constraints on everything from gas turbine supply chains to grid infrastructure are emerging as critical bottlenecks. So how does the global energy system evolve from here, and what do these competing pressures reveal about what lies ahead for

title: Congo Eurobonds Defy Ebola as Investors Chase Rare Yield, AI Exposure
title_cn: 投资者追逐稀有收益和人工智能，刚果欧洲债券抵御埃博拉病毒
summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo’s Eurobonds have remained resilient even as it grapples with an Ebola outbreak, buoyed by high yields and the nation’s exposure to metals that underpin the global artificial intelligence boom.

summary: Traders in Reliance Industries Ltd.’s treasury department are strategizing over where to park the company’s cash in case the Reserve Bank of India starts raising interest rates in the coming months.

summary: Fuji Media Holdings Inc. has received stronger-than-expected interest in its real estate subsidiary, attracting bidders including KKR & Co., Blackstone Inc. and Goldman Sachs Group Inc., people familiar with the matter said.

title: BofA Says Foreign Buyers Lured by UK Yields Despite Politics

summary: Overseas investors turned net sellers of Japanese shares for the first time in two months last week, ending a buying streak that helped drive the nation’s benchmark to multiple all-time highs.

summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit down with FIFA Chief Football Officer Jill Ellis. Before the World Cup, Ellis shares her thoughts on ticket prices, revenue expectations and the growth of the game. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Odd Lots: Goldman’s Solomon on Banks in the Age of AI (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：高盛的所罗门谈人工智能时代的银行（播客）
summary: There’s a lot of debate about the future of AI — not just whether it will produce the returns investors are expecting, but also if AI will lead to mass worker displacement. Big banks are the perfect prism through which to explore some of these questions. Not only are they deploying AI very quickly, but they have a wide range of workers who are using the technology, from back-office employees to junior analysts to the most senior investment bankers. In this episode, we speak with David Solomon, c

title_cn: 摩根士丹利 IPO 竞争愈演愈烈，高盛激起游说火箭
summary: No sooner had Goldman Sachs Group Inc. locked in top billing for the SpaceX IPO than Morgan Stanley dashed off a note to clients that it was actually co-lead on the deal, noting that their listing is in alphabetical order.

title_cn: 标准银行表示，非洲超级富豪纷纷涌入房地产以保住财富

title_cn: 瑞银集团的可汗认为对冲基金的需求比私人信贷的需求更大

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/4/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/4/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Funds, Industry Buyers Eye BlackRock’s Australian Battery Builder Akaysha
title_cn: 基金和行业买家关注贝莱德的澳大利亚电池制造商 Akaysha
summary: Industry players and pension funds are among the suitors eyeing a stake of 50-60% in BlackRock-backed Australian battery developer Akaysha Energy Pty Ltd., according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: MMC Port Is Said to Approach Bidders for Potential Stake Sale
title_cn: 据称MMC港口正在就潜在股权出售事宜与竞标者接洽
summary: Malaysian tycoon Syed Mokhtar Al-Bukhary’s MMC Port Holdings Sdn. has approached prospective bidders for a minority stake in the company, according to people familiar with the matter, after postponing an initial public offering last year.

title: Bill Ackman’s Pershing Exits €1.4 Billion Universal Music Stake
title_cn: 比尔·阿克曼 (Bill Ackman) 的潘兴 (Pershing) 退出环球音乐 14 亿欧元的股份
summary: Bill Ackman sold his €1.42 billion ($1.65 billion) stake in Universal Music Group NV just days after the Amsterdam-listed company rejected a takeover bid by the hedge fund billionaire.

title: Gold Rises as Dip-Buyers Return After Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire
title_cn: 以色列-黎巴嫩停火后，黄金买家回归，金价上涨
summary: Gold pushed higher after Israel and Lebanon agreed to a conditional ceasefire, a possible step toward resolving the wider Middle East conflict that’s upended global energy markets and raised inflation risks.

title: Bejjani: UAE Holding Up Well During Regional Uncertainty
title_cn: 贝贾尼：阿联酋在地区不确定性中表现良好
summary:
The Middle East business community is navigating a period of unprecedented uncertainty, as the Iran conflict disrupts supply chains, travel and investment flows across the region. Alain Bejjani, Author of NEXT: Leading Through the New Realities & former CEO of Majid Al Futtaim  spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on how businesses are adapting in the current environment.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Conflict Forces Asian Countries to Choose Sides? | Insight with Haslinda Amin 06/04/2026
title_cn: 美伊冲突迫使亚洲国家选边站队？ |哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 06/04/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo Set to Hand Over Control of Reno de Medici to Bondholders
title_cn: 阿波罗计划将雷诺德美第奇的控制权移交给债券持有人
summary: Apollo Global Management is set to hand over the keys of Reno de Medici SpA to its bondholders, as part of a debt restructuring, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Bitcoin Has Longest Losing Streak Since August In Bruising Week
title_cn: 比特币在惨痛的一周中出现自八月以来最长的连续下跌
summary: Bitcoin is poised for its longest losing streak since August, weighed down by the Middle East conflict, liquidations of bullish bets and this week’s rare sale of tokens by the dominant corporate buyer.

title: Thailand’s Richest Man Plans $4.3 Billion Expansion Amid AI Boom
title_cn: 泰国首富计划在人工智能热潮中斥资 43 亿美元扩张
summary: Thailand’s richest man, Sarath Ratanavadi, plans to spend as much as 140 billion baht ($4.3 billion) through Gulf Development Pcl over the next five years to expand data centers and other infrastructure needed to support the artificial intelligence boom.

title: US Tech Sector Announces Most Job Cuts in Nearly Two Years
title_cn: 美国科技行业宣布近两年来最大规模裁员
summary: US technology companies in May announced the most job cuts in nearly two years as they ramp up spending on artificial intelligence.

title: Iran Says No Progress in US Talks | The Opening Trade 6/4/2026
title_cn: 伊朗表示与美国的谈判没有取得进展开盘交易 6/4/2026
summary:
Iran said there had been no recent progress in talks with the US over an interim peace deal, while fighting persisted in Lebanon despite Washington’s declaration of a ceasefire between Israel and the country.

Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said late Wednesday that “no tangible progress has been achieved in the negotiation process” with the US, according to the semi-official Tasnim news agency.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Boom Propels China Optical Maker to Top Weighting on CSI 300
title_cn: AI热潮推动中国光缆企业登上沪深300权重榜首
summary: A Chinese optical transceiver maker has overtaken a battery giant as the top-weighted firm in China’s equities benchmark, the latest sign of how a broadening AI rally is reshaping the world’s second-largest stock market.

title: AI Bubble 'Something to Look At,' BNP's Huynh Says
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行 (BNP) 的 Huynh 表示，人工智能泡沫“值得关注”
summary: Sophie Huynh, senior cross asset strategist at BNP Paribas Asset Management, discusses the risk of a so-called bubble in the artificial intelligence trade space. "What I'm looking at much more is tokens rationing," she tells Bloomberg Television. "There's anecdotes here and there that we're consuming so much tokens at this point that there's not going to be enough," Huynh says. She also discusses the impact of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East on markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank’s PayPay to Buy T&D’s Life Insurer for $840 Million
title_cn: 软银旗下 PayPay 将以 8.4 亿美元收购 T&D 人寿保险公司
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s payments unit is buying the life insurance unit of T&D Holdings Inc. for ¥134.3 billion ($840 million) to broaden its offerings and better compete in Japan’s ballooning fintech market.

title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon on Running a Bank in the Age of AI | Odd Lots
title_cn: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门谈人工智能时代的银行运营零股
summary: There's a lot of debate about the future of AI — not just whether it will produce the returns investors are expecting, but also if AI will lead to mass worker displacement. Big banks are the perfect prism through which to explore some of these questions. Not only are they deploying AI very quickly, but they have a wide range of workers who are using the technology, from back-office employees to junior analysts to the most senior investment bankers. We spoke with David Solomon, chairman and CEO of Goldman Sachs, about the impact of AI on the banking business, and why he does not predict a major white collar wipeout. We talk about the outlook for headcount, current conditions in capital markets, and the bank's role in the upcoming SpaceX IPO and Alphabet's historic equity capital raise. He also tells us about his early career in junk bonds and (with his love of electronic dance music) how AI is transforming music production. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Concentration Risk Is the Problem: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 人工智能集中风险是问题所在：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TSMC Warns Chip Supply Won’t Meet AI-Fueled Demand for Years
title_cn: 台积电警告芯片供应多年来无法满足人工智能驱动的需求
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s global chip supply will fall short of AI-fueled demand for years to come, chief executive officer C.C. Wei said, suggesting production capacity remains a key bottleneck in the buildout of global computing infrastructure.

title: SpaceX Seeks to Raise $75 Billion in Record IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 寻求通过创纪录的 IPO 融资 750 亿美元
summary: SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an initial public offering that would be the biggest of all time. Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company plans to market about 555.6 million shares for $135 each, according to its filing Wednesday with the US Securities and Exchange Commission. Bloomberg's Manuel Baigorri reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Broadcom AI Chip Outlook Disappoints Investors
title_cn: 博通人工智能芯片前景令投资者失望
summary: Broadcom shares fell in extended trading after the company delivered a disappointing forecast for artificial intelligence chip revenue. Chief Executive Officer Hock Tan said the company $56 billion in AI chips in the fiscal year that ends in October. The forecast that fell short of the average estimate of $57.6 billion. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hiranandani Group CEO on Powering India's Digital Future
title_cn: Hiranandani 集团首席执行官谈推动印度的数字未来
summary: Darshan Hiranandani, CEO of Hiranandani Group, one of India's premier real estate and infrastructure development conglomerates, discusses how his company aims to help transform the nation into a global hub for cloud computing, AI and digital services. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cerebras Says It’s Working With All AI Gear Makers Except Nvidia
title_cn: Cerebras 表示正在与除 Nvidia 之外的所有人工智能设备制造商合作
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. plans to cooperate with a wide variety of suppliers of AI data center components, opening the way for further partnerships that mirror its agreement with Amazon.com Inc.

title: Putin Turns Russia’s AI Future Into a Kremlin Family Business
title_cn: 普京将俄罗斯人工智能的未来变成克里姆林宫的家族企业
summary: President Vladimir Putin’s push for what he calls Russia’s technological sovereignty is turning into a family affair with the development of key sectors entrusted to one of his daughters and the children of close allies.

title: Netflix Aims to Use AI to Help Viewers Manage Content Overload
title_cn: Netflix 旨在利用人工智能帮助观众管理内容过载
summary: Netflix Inc. is using AI to help customers cut through the noise of content overload, said Elizabeth Stone, the streaming service’s chief product and technology officer.

title: Why Amazon Has Struggled to Crack India
title_cn: 亚马逊为何难以攻克印度市场
summary: More than a decade after entering the country, the company is battling Walmart’s Flipkart and other incumbents.

title: Sam Altman Says He Doesn’t Plan to Put Money Into 2026 Elections
title_cn: 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 表示，他不打算为 2026 年选举投入资金
summary: OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman says he has no plans to make any financial contributions toward this year’s US elections, even as other Silicon Valley billionaires have already pledged to spend heavily to influence midterm races that will decide control of Congress.

title: SpaceX Seeks $75 Billion in Record IPO to Fund AI, Launch
title_cn: SpaceX 寻求 750 亿美元创纪录的 IPO 来资助人工智能和发射
summary: SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an initial public offering that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings.

title: DoubleLine’s Robert Cohen on AI Debt Loads, Private Credit
title_cn: DoubleLine 的 Robert Cohen 谈人工智能债务负担、私人信贷
summary: Robert Cohen, Director of Global Developed Credit at DoubleLine, discusses the current corporate fundraising environment. He notes that despite ongoing capital raising activities in both debt and equity markets, companies—particularly high-quality ones—continue to maintain strong balance sheets and generate healthy cash flow. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. SEC Chair: Giants Like SpaceX Need To Find Revenue Model
title_cn: 先生。 SEC 主席：SpaceX 等巨头需要寻找盈利模式
summary: Gary Gensler, former chair of both the CFTC and SEC, discusses the capital markets and the regulatory challenges they face. The discussion highlights the anticipated surge in IPO activity in 2026, with reported estimates of capital raised reaching up to $75 billion. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Broadcom Slides After AI Chip Outlook Disappoints Investors
title_cn: 人工智能芯片前景令投资者失望后博通股价下滑
summary: Broadcom Inc. shares fell in extended trading after the company delivered a disappointing forecast for artificial intelligence chip revenue, signaling its efforts to gain ground in the burgeoning industry are going more slowly than anticipated.

title: New McKinsey Report Probes US Manufacturing Vulnerabilities
title_cn: 麦肯锡新报告探讨美国制造业的脆弱性
summary: Eric Kutcher, McKinsey senior partner and North America chair, said that the technology sector is the where the US remains the most vulnerable to offshore supply chain disruptions as the world up its reliance on semiconductor chips, servers and PCs built in China. Kutcher said that while the US doesn't currently have the manufacturing ability for many of these items, new 'generations' of tech innovation provide opportunity to build out the infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rockefeller’s Sharma on AI Boom, US Market Fault Lines
title_cn: 洛克菲勒的夏尔马谈人工智能繁荣和美国市场断层线
summary: Ruchir Sharma, chairman of Rockefeller International and founder and chief investment officer of Breakout Capital, joins to provide insight into the current market dynamics. Sharma references his Financial Times op-ed, arguing that despite strong tech sector profits driven by AI advancements, the earnings narrative may be less robust than investors perceive, suggesting emerging vulnerabilities in the market. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Seeks to Raise $75 Billion in IPO Plan
title_cn: SpaceX寻求通过IPO计划筹集750亿美元
summary: SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an IPO that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, space and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Seeks $75B in Record IPO Plan to Fund AI, Launch
title_cn: SpaceX寻求75B美元创纪录的IPO计划以资助人工智能和发射
summary:
SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an initial public offering that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, space and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings.
The Starbase, Texas-based company plans to market about 555.6 million shares for $135, according to its filing Wednesday with the US Securities and Exchange Commission. At that price, SpaceX would have a market value of almost $1.77 trillion based on the outstanding shares in the filing. Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Thailand’s Thaksin to Head to Dubai After Royal Pardon Sets Him Free
title_cn: 泰国他信在皇家赦免后获释后将前往迪拜
summary: Once Thailand’s most powerful politician, Thaksin Shinawatra is returning to the city that served as his base during 15 years of exile as his influence at home fades.

title: Swiss May Extend Older Fighter Jets Over Delayed US F-35 Deal
title_cn: 瑞士可能因美国 F-35 交易推迟而延长旧型战斗机的采购期限
summary: Switzerland will review extending the lifespan of its current fighter jets because a proposed 6 billion-franc ($7.6 billion) deal to buy new aircraft from the US is caught up in a dispute over the price.

title: Kyle Refuses to Set India Deal Timeline Amid Spat Over Steel
title_cn: 凯尔拒绝在钢铁争端中设定印度交易时间表
summary: Business Secretary Peter Kyle declined to set a timeline to bring into force Britain’s free trade agreement with India after the Asian nation warned UK steel safeguards could prompt a rethink of tariff concessions.

title: France Under Macron Looks Like an AI Winner, for Now
title_cn: 马克龙领导下的法国目前看来是人工智能的赢家
summary: The French president has been an early advocate, touting his country’s tech talent and nuclear power.

title: Israel, Lebanon Reach Ceasefire as US Seeks to Revive Iran Talks
title_cn: 美国寻求重启伊朗谈判，以色列和黎巴嫩达成停火
summary: The US says Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a ceasefire if Hezbollah also stops fighting, in the latest attempt by the Trump administration to keep peace talks with Iran on track as political opposition to the war intensifies. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Italy, US and France at Odds Over Next Special Envoy to Bosnia
title_cn: 意大利、美国和法国在下任波斯尼亚特使问题上存在分歧
summary: Key nations tasked with selecting the next special envoy to Bosnia and Herzegovina are at odds over whom to appoint to the role and what kind of weight it should carry, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Is Mexico Safe? World Cup Fans Are About to Find Out
title_cn: 墨西哥安全吗？世界杯球迷即将揭晓
summary: The historic city of Guadalajara embodies the tension between soccer euphoria and the country’s festering security crisis.

title: France Calls US Tariffs Unjustified, Seeks to Finish Trade Pact
title_cn: 法国称美国关税不合理，寻求完成贸易协定
summary: French Finance Minister Roland Lescure called a new American tariff proposal unjustified, but said he hopes the move would lead to the European Union and US finally implementing their trade accord.

title: Farage’s Reform UK Gets £7 Million More From Crypto Donors
title_cn: Farage’s Reform UK 从加密货币捐助者那里获得了 700 万英镑的额外资金
summary: Nigel Farage’s Reform UK extended its record-breaking fundraising streak with another £7 million ($9.4 million) in donations from crypto investors, fueling concerns about the industry’s growing influence over the party tipped to run the British government after the next election.

title: Russia’s War Is Getting Too Expensive, Finance Officials Warn Putin
title_cn: 财政官员警告普京，俄罗斯的战争成本太高
summary:
Senior government officials have warned Russian President Vladimir Putin that spending on the war in Ukraine is on an unaffordable path.

It’s the most serious sign of internal division in Moscow since the full-scale invasion began, Anthony Halpin explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romanian President Set to Nominate Adviser Tomac for Premiership
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总统将提名总理顾问托马克
summary: Romanian President Nicusor Dan is poised to nominate his adviser, Eugen Tomac, as prime minister in a bid to end a political crisis and tackle one of the European Union’s widest budget deficits, according to people familiar.

title: Streeting Says Labour Leadership Challenge Won't Be a 'Coronation'
title_cn: 斯特里廷称工党领导力挑战不会成为“加冕”
summary: Former Health Minister Wes Streeting vowed he would fight a battle against Mayor of Greater Manchester Andy Burnham if the two went head-to-head in a race for the leadership of the governing Labour Party. "He needs to set out his stall, I need to set out mine," Streeting said in conversation with Bloomberg’s Francine Lacqua at the SXSW London tech festival Wednesday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Says No Progress in US Talks as Lebanon Sees More Clashes
title_cn: 伊朗称美国谈判没有取得进展，黎巴嫩冲突加剧
summary: Iran said there had been no recent progress in talks with the US over an interim peace deal, while fighting persisted in Lebanon despite Washington’s declaration of a ceasefire between Israel and the country.

title: What to Know As Swiss Prepare to Vote on 10 Million Population Cap
title_cn: 瑞士准备就 1000 万人口上限进行投票时需要了解什么
summary: The growing prominence of far-right political parties in Europe is pressuring governments to introduce stricter controls on immigration. Switzerland will take the idea to the next level on June 14 with a vote on whether to cap its population at 10 million.

title: China Sanctions First New Zealand Lawmakers Over Taiwan Trip
title_cn: 中国因台湾行制裁首批新西兰议员
summary: China has imposed its first travel bans on New Zealand lawmakers after they visited Taiwan, escalating Beijing’s efforts to isolate Taipei and deter foreign governments from engaging with the self-ruled democracy.

title: Kuwait Bears Brunt of Iran’s Retaliation Against US Ship Attacks
title_cn: 科威特首当其冲受到伊朗对美国船只袭击的报复
summary: Kuwait, a staunch US ally, has become a key target of Iran as its ceasefire with Washington frays and their clashes escalate.

title: Women Take Majority of Cabinet Seats in First for Denmark
title_cn: 丹麦首次由女性占据内阁多数席位
summary: Denmark’s new cabinet reached a record level of female representation, with women outnumbering men for the first time in the Nordic country.

title: Swedish Bank Tax Promised by Opposition Party as Election Nears
title_cn: 选举临近，反对党承诺瑞典银行税
summary: Sweden‘s main opposition party, the Social Democrats, is standing by plans for a temporary tax on banks despite warnings from lenders and some economists that the measure would push up mortgage costs for households.

title: Satellite Images Fuel Speculation of Xi Visit to North Korea
title_cn: 卫星图像助长习近平访问朝鲜的猜测
summary: Satellite imagery appears to show construction at a square in central Pyongyang that has served as a focal point for visits by foreign leaders, fueling speculation that Chinese President Xi Jinping may soon make his first trip to North Korea in more than six years.

title: US Seeks To Revive Iran Talks as Israel, Lebanon Reach Ceasefire | Daybreak Europe 06/04/2026
title_cn: 随着以色列和黎巴嫩达成停火，美国寻求重启伊朗谈判欧洲黎明 06/04/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

The US said Israel and Lebanon agreed to a ceasefire if Hezbollah also stops fighting, the latest attempt by the Trump administration to keep peace talks with Iran on track as political opposition to the war intensifies.

And momentum in the artificial-intelligence trade was dented by Broadcom delivering a disappointing forecast for AI chip revenue, signaling its efforts to gain ground in the burgeoning industry are going more slowly than anticipated. 

Today's guest: Lale Akoner, eToro, Global Market Analyst. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Singapore Ex-Minister Backs Trump’s Focus on China Over Taiwan
title_cn: 新加坡前部长支持特朗普在台湾问题上关注中国
summary: Singapore’s former defense chief backed US President Donald Trump’s apparent move to prioritize ties with China over Taiwan, saying that approach could foster regional and global stability.

title: Germany, France, UK Sketch Plan for Putin Talks on Ukraine
title_cn: 德国、法国、英国普京乌克兰问题会谈草图
summary: A group of Ukraine’s key European allies are working on plans with Kyiv to engage Russia in negotiations to end the war as they see a shift in momentum strengthening President Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s position.

title: European Allies Work on Plan to Engage Putin in Ukraine Talks
title_cn: 欧洲盟友正在制定让普京参与乌克兰谈判的计划
summary: Officials from Germany, France and the UK are working on plans with Kyiv to engage Russia in negotiations to end the war in Ukraine. The key European allies have been discussing the possibility of holding talks involving both sides, according to people familiar with the matter. Bloomberg's Anthony Halpin reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prabowo Warns Over Graft as $15 Billion Food Program Probed
title_cn: 150 亿美元粮食计划受到调查，普拉博沃警告贪污行为
summary: Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto warned he will not tolerate corruption, saying he got directly involved in firing the head of his flagship $15 billion free meals program aimed at alleviating poverty and malnutrition.

title: California Governor Race Takes Shape as Hilton, Becerra Lead
title_cn: 希尔顿、贝塞拉领先加州州长竞选初具规模
summary: Republican Steve Hilton and Democrat Xavier Becerra surged to the top of California’s crowded gubernatorial primary, with billionaire Tom Steyer trailing in a contest shaped by money, scandal and uncertainty.

title: Kim Jong Un Tours New Nuclear Site, Says Output Capacity Doubled
title_cn: 金正恩视察新核电站，称输出能力翻倍
summary: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un has unveiled what state media described as a new nuclear materials production facility as he pushes to expand the country’s nuclear arsenal, amid reports China’s president may travel to Pyongyang in coming weeks.

title: Ex-MI6 Chief on Iran Conflict, China’s Intelligence Push
title_cn: 军情六处前局长谈伊朗冲突和中国情报推动
summary: Sixth Street Senior Strategist and Former MI6 Chief Richard Moore unpacks the escalating Iran war and China’s intelligence offensive. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AMLO Breaks Silence to Back Sheinbaum Amid Tensions With US
title_cn: 在与美国关系紧张之际，奥夫拉多尔打破沉默支持希恩鲍姆
summary: Mexico’s former President Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador, who repeatedly pledged to stay out of politics after leaving office, issued a public statement backing President Claudia Sheinbaum and criticizing growing US pressure on her government.

title: Trump Says He Plans to Make Blanche ‘Permanent Attorney General’
title_cn: 特朗普称他计划任命布兰奇为“永久司法部长”
summary: President Donald Trump announced that he planned to soon make Todd Blanche “permanent attorney general” months after he assumed that post in an acting capacity, according to a video posted by a White House aide on Wednesday night.
